title: Evaluation & Survey
learningObjectives: Derive and implement PSNR, SSIM, and LPIPS from first principles and explain what each captures about image quality.
Describe the properties and scene types of Tanks & Temples, Deep Blending, Mip-NeRF 360, and Synthetic NeRF datasets.
Explain why cross-paper 3DGS quality comparisons are unreliable without a standardized testing protocol.
Identify the key standardization decisions (resolution, train/test split, initialization) that affect reported metrics.

readings.title: Image Quality Metrics: PSNR, SSIM, and LPIPS
Benchmark Datasets for Novel View Synthesis
Standardized Testing Protocol and the 3DGS.zip Survey
